description: You are an electrical engineering technician preparing the electrical drawings for a residential building permit. Using the garage floor plan at '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan.dxf', overlay a complete residential electrical panel schedule. The drawing must include a panel schedule table with circuit numbers and descriptions on an 'E-PANEL' or equivalent dedicated layer, branch circuit annotations on a dedicated circuit layer, load calculation values (watts, VA, or amperage), and a main breaker or panel rating annotation. Include at least 4 different circuit descriptions for typical residential branch circuits (e.g., LIGHTING, RECEPTACLES, HVAC, DRYER, KITCHEN, GARAGE) and electrical notes or specifications text. Save the completed drawing to '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan_electrical.dxf'.
